zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Bentley於1226年出生在英國越可爾本特利時，她的父親Robert Bently26歲，母親Mrs. Robert De Bentley23歲。她於1241年與Adam de Newmarche III在英國英格蘭德比夏爾阿希布恩結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1315年在她的家鄉享年89歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Bentley于1226年出生在英国越可爾本特利时，她的父亲Robert Bently26岁，母亲Mrs. Robert De Bentley23岁。她于1241年与Adam de Newmarche III在英国英格兰德比夏爾阿希布恩结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1315年在她的家乡享年89岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bentley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places, the chief of which are in Derbyshire, Essex, Hampshire, Shropshire, Staffordshire, Suffolk, Warwickshire, Worcestershire, and East and South Yorkshire. The placename is from Old English beonet ‘bent grass’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.
In some cases also an Americanized form of South German Bentele or of its Swiss German or South German cognates Bandle and Bandli.

variants.name: Bently
meanings: Variant of   Bentley   2, a surname of South German or Swiss German origin.

variants.name: Bentele
meanings: South German: from a short form of the personal name Pantaleon (see Pantaleo ).

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Bentley was born in 1226, in Bentley, Yorkshire, England, her father, Robert Bently, was 26 and her mother, Mrs. Robert De Bentley, was 23. She married Adam de Newmarche III in 1241, in Ashbourne, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1315, in her hometown, at the age of 89.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Bentley est née en 1226, à Bentley, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Robert Bently, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Robert De Bentley, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Adam de Newmarche III en 1241, à Ashbourne, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1315, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 89 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Bentley 1226 in Bentley, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Bently 26 und ihre Mutter Mrs. Robert De Bentley 23. Sie hat 1241 in Ashbourne, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom Adam de Newmarche III geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1315 im Alter von 89 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Bentley è nata il nel 1226 nel Bentley, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Robert Bently, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Mrs. Robert De Bentley, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Adam de Newmarche III nel 1241, nel Ashbourne, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1315, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 89 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Bentley(이)가 1226년 영국 요르크실르 벤틀리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Bently(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. Robert De Bentley(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1241년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 애스h보우른에서 Adam de Newmarche III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1315년 그녀의 고향에서 89세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Bentley родилась в 1226 г. в местности бентли, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert Bently было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Robert De Bentley, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Adam de Newmarche III в 1241 г. в местности ашбурн, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1315 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 89 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Bentley nació en 1226, en Bentley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Bently, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Mrs. Robert De Bentley, tenía 23 años.
